legends.name: Rostam
legends.title: The Immortal Warrior of Light
legends.story: Rostam, the greatest warrior of ancient Persia, awakens in PersiaNexus as a guardian chosen by the Eternal Flame. His courage becomes a force that protects the worlds against the Shadow Legion.

legends.name: Avicenna
legends.title: The Master of Eternal Wisdom
legends.story: Avicenna enters PersiaNexus as the guardian of forgotten knowledge. His mind connects ancient wisdom with future intelligence, creating the bridge between humanity and cosmic understanding.

legends.name: Arvand
legends.title: The First Guardian of PersiaNexus
legends.story: Arvand was the first guardian created to unite ancient Persian energy with future technology. He protects the balance between worlds.
